TAP ANYWHERE TO ENTER
WHERE DCUs GO TO DIE
Burned DCUs don't disappear — they fracture into fragments and drift into the void.

Hunt them down. Fight off enemies. Trade your fragments at the DCU Market Place for real DCUs.
WASD — MOVE  |  G — GOGGLES  |  E — MARKET (near sign)
HOVER FRAGMENT → HOLD → CLICK to scan
